codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix against the prior failing 50c09d7 filename-based approach. In bb00b7d, `_sanitize_bip39_xml` is now content-aware (`scripts/emulator-debug-flow.py:220-267`), `dump_ui()` routes every dump through it before writing both the rolling `window_dump.xml` and any named dump (`scripts/emulator-debug-flow.py:270-308`), and `_dump_flow_error()` still captures `flow-error.xml` via `dump_ui("flow-error")` (`scripts/emulator-debug-flow.py:1666`). The unnamed polling paths also call bare `dump_ui()` (`scripts/emulator-debug-flow.py:394,446,924,1168,1208,1429,1458,1558`), so failure-path working dumps are covered too. The expanded self-test adds positive RecoveryPhrase coverage and negative non-RecoveryPhrase passthrough checks (`scripts/emulator-debug-flow.py:1739-1884`), and the downloaded bb00b7d emulator artifact shows `recovery-phrase.xml` redacted while `main-wallet.xml`, `after-relaunch.xml`, and `window_dump.xml` remain intact on non-RecoveryPhrase screens. I found no blocking correctness issues in the fix.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `ci-runner` skill still scopes mnemonic and long-hex leak scans to `logcat-*.txt`, even though mission guidance now requires checking uploaded XML dumps because `uiautomator dump` can leak RecoveryPhrase content.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/ci-runner/SKILL.md:119-126` only greps `logcat-*.txt` for mnemonic/hex leakage, while `.factory/library/user-testing.md:35-75` now documents content-aware XML sanitization and tells validators to scan uploaded XML dumps too.

summary: Reviewed worker session `4b427432-4e89-4145-be87-52c9068841f3`, the prior failing review, both diffs (`50c09d7` and `bb00b7d`), the fix handoff, the transcript skeleton, and the bb00b7d emulator artifact XMLs. The new content-aware sanitizer closes the original leak by covering named dumps, the rolling `window_dump.xml`, and `flow-error.xml` without altering clean non-RecoveryPhrase dumps in the added negative tests or in the green artifact set, so this fix passes review.
